mission.title: Install and Configure Agones
mission.description: Agones is a CNCF platform for hosting, running, and scaling dedicated multiplayer game servers on Kubernetes. It provides GameServer and Fleet custom resources for managing the full lifecycle of game server instances.

steps.title: Add the Agones Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official Agones Helm chart repository.

```bash
helm repo add agones https://agones.dev/chart/stable
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Agones using Helm
steps.description:
Install Agones into a dedicated namespace.

```bash
helm install agones agones/agones --namespace agones-system --create-namespace
```

steps.title: Verify Agones pods are running
steps.description:
Check that the Agones controller and related pods are running.

```bash
kubectl get pods -n agones-system
```

> You should see agones-controller, agones-allocator, and agones-ping pods in Running state.

steps.title: Create a test GameServer
steps.description:
Deploy a simple UDP game server to verify Agones is working.

```bash
kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/agones-dev/agones/release-1.57.0/examples/simple-game-server/gameserver.yaml
```

steps.title: Verify GameServer is ready
steps.description:
Check the GameServer reached Ready state.

```bash
kubectl get gameservers
```

> The STATUS should show Ready with an assigned port.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Agones
uninstall.description:
Remove Agones from your cluster.

```bash
helm uninstall agones -n agones-system
```
